titleStmt.title: SII 17.243: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 243. (A.R. No. 221 of 1904.) MĒLŚĒVŪR, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north base of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vṛishabhapurīśvara temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti. Tirumagal pōla etc., of the king.

This records that on representations made by the authorities of the temple of Tiruttāṉṟōṉṟippirāṉ in the eastern division of Śiṅgapura-nāḍu, Aruḷmoḻi-Mūvēndavēḷār, an officer who was conducting enquiries about the condition of villages from Perumaṇḍai in Perumaṇḍai-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam, made over the lands in Peruṅguḷattūr and Puduppāḍikkallēri-kkuḷaṅgaṟai to them towards worship and various other offerings. It was stipulated that the paddy collected as vāḍākkaḍaṉ from the lands according to the mēlvāram should be spent for the various items elaborately specified in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilaccelviyu n=taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai ma
ṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum ṉuḷampapāṭi
yum (ṉuḷampa pāṭiyum) taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai ñāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai puka
ḻa Īḻamaṇṭalamu n=tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷḷe
llā viyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirā
jarāja rājakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8 Āvatu Aruḷmoḻi muventaveḷār veṇ kuṉṟakkoṭṭattu
perumaṇṭaināṭṭu perumaṇṭaiyile Iruntu Ūrkaḷai vinavāyirukka ciṅkapuranāṭṭuk kiḻvaḻi
t tiruttāṉṟoṉṟippirān koyilukku ḷastānamuṭaiya Īcānacivaṉum brahmacivaṉum
Uḷḷiṭṭa tevakanmikaḷ vantu Ittevarkku nivan=tañ ceytatillai Ittevar tevatāna māṉa ciṅkapuranāṭṭu kiḻ
vaḻi tevatāṉap peruṅkuḷattūraiyum Ittevar tevatānam putuppāṭi kallerikkuḷaṅ kaṟaiyaiyum paṟ
ṟuppārttu nivan=tañceytu taraveṇṭum Eṉṟu colla Ipperuṅkuḷattūraiyum putuppāṭi kallerikkuṟaṅ
kaṟaiyaiyum ṉila maḷappittu ṉil maḷan=tapaṭi ṉir nilam patiṉeṇcaraṇ kolāl Āyiram kuḻi koṇṭatu
paṭṭiyākap peruṅkuḷattūr nirnilam Irupatteḻupaṭṭiyil Ukaiccarkaḷukku nilaṅkalantavāṟu Aiñcu paṭṭi nilam ni
kki niṉṟa nilam Irupattiraṇṭu paṭṭiyāl paṭṭi Oṉṟiṉukku melvārattāl vanta ṉellu Aṟu
kalamāka Irupattiraṇṭu paṭṭiyāl nellu Āyirattu munṉūṟṟirupatik kalamum putuppāṭi
kallerikkuṟaṅkaṟai ṉir nilam paṭṭi Aiñcemukkāliṉāl paṭṭioṉṟiṉukku melvāram nellu muppat
taiṅkalamāka Ivvaiñce mukkāṟpaṭṭiyāl van=ta nellu Irunūṟṟoru kalane mukku ṟuṇiyum
Ivvurkaḷil kollai ñilaṅkaḷil Uvaccarkaḷukku ṉilaṅkalanta vaṇṇam Iraṇṭāyiraṅ kuḻi ṉikki ṉiṉṟa kollaikaḷil
kkaṟai Iṭṭa pokaṅkoṇṭu Orāṭṭaikku poṉ patin kaḻañcāka poṉ kaḻañciṉukku nellup patiṉaiṅkalamāka nellu nūṟṟaimpati
n kalamum Āka nellu Eṇṇāḻiyum vaḻuvātakkā lāl Orāṭṭaikku vāṭākkaṭan Aḷappatāṉa nellu Āyi
rattu Āṟunūṟṟu Eḻupattoru kalaṉe mu kkuṟuṇiyum Īcāṉa civaṉum brahmacivaṉūm
Uḷḷiṭṭa tevakanmikaḷe vāṭākkaṭan Aṭṭuvatāka Innellukku nivan=tam cetapaṭi Uṭaiyārkku O
rupotaikkut tiruvamirtu Arici ṉānāḻi Āka A[ rddhayā] mattukku Uṭpaṭa ṇālu potaikkum Arici patakkiṉāl Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇam
nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum kaṟi Amutu porikkaṟi Oṉṟum miḷakupoṭi Oṉṟum paruppamirtu potu Uriyākat tupparuppu mu
ṉṟu potaipparuppu nāṭuriyum Arttayāmattukkum porikkaṟi Amutukkum Ākak kaṟi Amutukku Orunāḷaikku nellukkuṟuṇiyāka
neyyamutu Arttayāmattuk kuṭppaṭa potāḻākkāka neyyamirtu 2 kku Oru nāḷai nelluppatakkum tayira
mutu potu Uriyāka nālu potaikkum tayiramutu Irunāḻiyum nittam nellu munṉāḻiyum Aṭaikkā
yamirtu potu nālāka nālu potaikkum veṟṟilai Amutuṭpaṭa veṟuṅkāy patiṉāṟi ṉukku nicatam nel
lu nānāḻi tirumeypūccu cantaṉam śrīkaṇṭam nicatam Araippalamāka Orāṇṭu munnūṟṟu Aṟupa
tunāḷu nūṟṟu Eṇpatin palattukku Orāṭṭaikku nellu Irupatin kalamum citārikku Akiluñ cantaṉa
mum neriyāsam muncenṟā lacaiñcu pukaikka nicatam Araippalamāka Orāṇṭu munnūṟṟaṟupatu
kkum nūṟṟu Eṇpatin palattukku Orāṭṭai nāḷaikku nellu Irupattaiṅ kalamum nontā viḷakku
cilālekaippaṭi Erittuvarum nontā viḷakku nāliṉukkum nontā viḷakku Eḻiṉukku viḷakkoṉṟiṉukku nicata
m ney Uḻakkāka nicatam ney ṉā[ḻimuḻak(k)kiṉukku nicatam nellu Eḻukuṟuṇiyum
tu paṉṉiraṇṭāka muṉṟu yāmattukku nicatam ney nāḻikku nicatam nelluk kuṟuṇiyum A
na niṉṟiṉukku nellu paṉṉirukalaṉe tūṇippatakkukkum Āka Orāṇṭu
ḷ panṉiraṇṭu ntavanattukku nellu nūṟṟu Aimpatiṉ kalamum mu
kku vitānam piṭikkavum viḷakkup piṭikkavum tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟittu koṭukkavum muvarkkum ni
llukkuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum tiruvalakiṭṭut tirumeḻukku Iṭuvār Iruvarkku nicatam nellu Aṟuṉā
tiruviḻuttukku nīriṟaiccu kaḷai kalluvār Iruvarkku puṭavai mutal Uṭpaṭa nicatam nellup pata
ruvarkkut tiruviḻāppaṅkuni Uttiram tiruviḻā Eḻunāḷaikku viḻākkoṉṟukkum tiruviḷakku Eḻunāḷaikku
Eḻupatiṉāḻikkum Ākat tiruvuḻā Eḻunāḷaikku nellu [aimpatin kalamum tevarkkut tirupparicaṭṭamum tiru
kaṭṭiyum tirunamanikaiyum jalapavittiramum Uttiyum kārttikai viḷakku Iṭa viḷakki ṉukku ney tūṇi
ṉāka Ivvurt taṇṭakkuṟṟamum piṭilikai variyum koṇṭu ḷastānamuṭaiya Īcāna civaṉum brahma
civaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa tevakanmikaḷ ceyvippārkaḷākavum Ittevarkku koṭṭum Ukaccan ceṭan kaṭampaṉum pukaṭṭu
ṇaicūṟṟiyum Uḷḷiṭṭār ceyyum paṇikku Ipperuṅkuḷattu nilaṅkalantavāṟu Āyirakkuḻip paṭṭi Aiñcu
ṭṭiyum Ivvūrkkollaiyil Iraṇṭāyiraṅkuḻiyum koṇṭu Iñnilattāl nellu munnūṟṟu
kalattu ceyyum paṇi talaippaṟai Oṉṟum timilai Oṉṟum mattalam Oṉṟum kaṟaṭikai
ṟum kaimmaṇi Oṉṟum caṅku Iraṇṭum Āka Āḷppaṉṉiraṇṭu koṇṭu paḷḷi Eḻucci
Uṭppaṭa Epperppaṭṭatuṅ koṭṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum It timilai kaippiṭi Oṉṟum mu
luppataṟku ḷastānamuṭaiya Īcāna civaṉum brahmaci
vanum Uḷḷiṭṭa tevakanmikaḷukku Ācāriya pokattukku nicca
lu Irutūṇi Orāṭṭaikku nellu Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatin kalamum Āka nellu Aṟupat
(pa)ttoru kalanemukkuṟuṇiyum Ikkoyil koṭi ḷattu tevar tevatāṉam cūriya
llu munnūṟṟu muppattu mukkalanetūṇiyum poṉ naṅkaḻiñciṉāl , , , , ,
vum Āka nellu ṉānūṟṟu Orupatin kalattukku nivantañ ceytapaṭi Ittevarkku
tai m tiruvamirtu Arici kuṟuṇi nānāḻikku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇam Oru nāḷaikku nel
miḷa ruppamirtu poturiyāka ku paruppu nāṭurikkum Āka Oru nāḷaikku nā
tikkum ney Uḻakkāḻākkinukku nicatam nellukkuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum tayiramutu po
lu Irunāḻiyum tiruārātiṉai ceyyum Oruvaṉukku puṭa vai mutalukku
ḻiyum paricārakañ ceyyum māṇi Oṉṟukku puṭavai mutal Uṭpaṭa nicatam nellu kkuṟuṇiyu
m non=tāviḷakku ṉālinukku tirunon=tāviḷakku Oṉṟinukku nicatam ney Uḻakkā ka non=tāviḷakku nālinukku ni
ney nāḻiyum san=ti viḷakkup potu Āṟāka muṉṟu san=tikkum san=ti viḷakkinukku nicatam ney Uḻakku
Āka nicatam ney nāḻi Uḻakkinukku Orāṭṭaikku nellu nūṟṟu ṉāṟpattu Eḻu kalaṉetūṇi pa
takkum Āka nellu ṉāṉūṟṟu Oru patinkalamumIncomplete.
Another piece which does not run on reads as follows:

ṭṭa pari �ra tey kku [ kku śrī ba] li maṭaṅkum maṉa viḷakkerikka ney Uḻakkiṉukku nitam nellukkuṟu
ṇiyum śrībalikkum pūtapalikkum viḷakku Iraṇṭinukku muṉṟu potaikkummāka ney Uḻakkāḻākkinukku ni
catam nellukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum tiruvārātiṉai ceyum brāhmaṇan Oruvaṉukku nicatam nelluk kuṟu
ṇi Iru nāḻiyum Ivanukku Orāṭṭaikkup puṭavai mutalukku nelluppati tū
yum māṇi Iraṇṭukku puṭavai mutaluṭpaṭa Orāṭṭaikku nellup patakku nānā
Digital edition of SII 17.243 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
